query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_targets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  target_percentage INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 95,
  effective_date DATE NOT NULL,
  end_date DATE,
  created_by INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_dept_date (department, effective_date)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_targets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  target_percentage INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 95,
  effective_date DATE NOT NULL,
  end_date DATE,
  created_by INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_dept_date (department, effective_date)
);
